name: Baked Eggplant Tofu
recipeIngredient: 6 Japanese eggplants, cut into 1/2 to 3/4 inch slices
12 ounce tub tofu, sliced - 3 grams fat per 4 ounce serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the eggplant and tofu slices on a large sheet of foil to eliminate clean-up.
2. Sprinkle lemon pepper seasoning over the tofu slices.
3. Bake everything in a 400°F oven for about 40 minutes, or until well roasted.
4. Boil 1 pound whole wheat spaghetti.
5. Add all the veggies, including garlic, and squeeze out the canned crushed tomatoes and tarragon wine vinegar onto the pasta.
Note: The original recipe text contains additional commentary and notes that have been removed to focus solely on the ingredients and clear instructions for preparing Baked Eggplant Tofu.
